docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAZIO, JOE AS TO DEFENDANT STARKEY,SEAN AKA SEAN ROBINSON AKA JOHN PARKER DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT STARKEY,SEAN AKA SEAN ROBINSON AKA JOHN PARKER

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAZIO, JOE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-29-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 06 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUL-05-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF JUN-26-1995, OFF CALENDAR FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED.

THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. DEFENDANT, SEAN STARKEY, WILL PAY MAY AND JUNE RENT TOTALING 820.52. DEFENDANT STARKEY WILL ALSO REIMBURSE PLAINTIFF FAZIO FOR FILING FEES OF $80 AND SERVICE OF PROCESS FEES, $120.00. DEFENDANT,SEAN STARKEY, WILL SIGN A ONE YEAR WRITTEN LEASE ON 6-30-95, 11AM. RENT WILL BE DUE ON THE FIRST WITH A GRACE PERIOD UNTIL THE FIFTH. SEAN STARKEY WILL POST ONE MONTH'S RENT, 410.26, AS A SECURITY DEPOSIT. PLAINTIFF, JOE FAZIO WILL PAY INTEREST ON THIS AMOUNT. ON 6-30-95, 11 AM, DEFENDANT STARKEY WILL PAY TWO MONTHS RENT, A SECURITY DEPOSIT AND COURT FEES OWED TO PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF FAZIO WILL MAKE A GOOF FAITH EFFORT TO MAKE NECESSARY REPAIRS TO DEFENDANT.S APARTMENT. AFTER LEASE IS SIGNED AND ALL MONIES ARE PAID BY DEFENDANT STARKEY TO PLAINTIFF FAZIO, THIS CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, SETTLED AT SETTL CONF
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-29-1995 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
